'''A-5DS''' was a [[5DS Ebranite Relations Droid]]. The model was stout and had extra arms, because the 5DS series had been made to interact with multi-limbed [[Ebranite]] species.

A-5DS was the first 5DS to be produced. Somehow, it ended being property of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], which modified it.

The Rebel command assigned A-5DS as an assistant to Ebranite operative [[Rith Tar'ak]], who was to become a recruiter on her native [[Ebra]]. Tar'ak reprogrammed A-5DS so that it could help her to contact with Ebranite slaves on [[Grythsorin]] canyon.
